description_long: This is a military-style, twin-engine propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted in a blue-green camouflage pattern. The wings are straight and mid-mounted, each bearing a black cross insignia, and the tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is enclosed with a glass canopy, positioned forward on the fuselage, and appears to be multi-seat with multiple window panels. The engines are mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller and engine cowling. The landing gear is fixed, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The airplane's surface is mostly smooth and hard, with visible panel lines and military markings.
description: A blue-green, twin-propeller military airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, a glass canopy cockpit, and fixed landing gear. Features include black cross insignia, streamlined fuselage, and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the streamlined fuselage, mid-mounted wings, twin propeller engines, and the full tail assembly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin propellers, glass canopy cockpit, and the straight wings with insignia.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the fuselage, wing, and tail, with visible engine and propeller details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail structure, horizontal stabilizers, and the back of the cockpit canopy.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles; military insignia present on both wings.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines, each mounted on the leading edge of the wings with visible propellers.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with a glass canopy and multiple window panels.
